images.prompt: A busy Bengal quayside with steamer funnels and stacked crates, tweed-clad expedition members supervising porters in hot haze; sepia plate.
Darjeeling hill-station with kit piles, snow Kangchenjunga; sepia plate.
Phari Dzong mud-fort on windswept plain, yaks with kit; sepia plate.
Rongbuk monastery whitewashed on plain, Everest behind, monks with horns; sepia plate.
Two tents on North Col snow saddle, climbers in tweed; sepia plate.
Two figures roped on summit ridge with oxygen sets, swirling clouds; sepia plate.
